FlowCore Guide: Ordering 

Ordering via BIORESCO 

Log into BIORESCO 

Get to login screen: 

 Text

Description automatically generated 

Log into FlowCore Account 

Graphical user interface, text

Description automatically generated 

Log in under your name 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

 

Search for Items that Need to be Ordered 

Can use “PPE & Lab Essentials” to quickly find: 

Ethanol 

Bleach 

Using Search Box 

Part or Catalog Number 

Keyword 

Adjust Quantity and Place Item in Cart 

Note: Pay attention to the “Size” column as that tells you if you are buying a case, a box etc. 

“Buy” 

Stock directly in BIORESCO 

 

Change quantity  

Click “Buy” to add to cart 

“Punchout” 

Will take you to the vendor’s website 

 

Fill out the quantities and add to cart on vendor website 

A screenshot of a computer

Description automatically generated 

View the cart and “Checkout” to be taken back to BIORESCO page. 

Graphical user interface, application

Description automatically generated 

Confirm and Place Order 

Verify that the information for the order is correct 

Graphical user interface, text, application, email

Description automatically generated 

Specify if you want the order delivered or picked up 

A picture containing graphical user interface

Description automatically generated 

Place Order 

Graphical user interface, text, application, email

Description automatically generated 

Ordering via External Ordering Form 

Only use this if the part number, or something similar, is not available through BIORESCO 

Fill out the Cancer Center’s ordering form with the appropriate information 

Graphical user interface, text, application

Description automatically generated 

Important Fields 

Date 

Vendor Name and Phone 

Requested By 

Website: Make sure this link goes directly to the product being ordered 

Quantity  

Item Description 

Product Name (as shown on website) 

Part or Catalog Number 

Unit Price 

Total Amount 

E-Mail completed form to Lisa Beil so she can place the order
